title: cypripedium fasciolatum subsp. farreri
intro: Cypripedium fasciolatum subsp. farreri, also known as Farrer's lady's slipper, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Farrer's lady's slipper include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
